text.message: My brick port is so awesome
I mean I pointed that way fist
i rather be trading you but guess i have to give the leaders cards
Well, I wanted the center so wasn’t gonna trade, didn’t know red would give
But center is played out now so we can move on
K keep targeting me I’ll keep targeting you green
You’ve only stolen from me when red has city
You cause you stole from me
red trade or i just build roads all game
